# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI for External Contributors

on: 
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize]

jobs: 
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        id: test

      - name: Post results as comment
        if: ${{ always() }}
        run: |
          echo "## Test Results" >> result.txt
          echo "Tests ran with exit code ${{ steps.test.outcome }}" >> result.txt
          cat result.txt
          echo "::set-output name=result::$(cat result.txt)"
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Comment on PR
        if: ${{ always() }}
        run: |
          comment_body="Testing results:\n\`\`\`$(cat result.txt)\`\`\`"
          gh pr comment ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} --body "$comment_body" || echo "Failed to post comment"
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
